\tzpentry{ID5477}{Function Source Addr Target Addr Module Path Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5477 introduces Function Source Addr Target Addr Module Path Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$ Function[{source_addr, target_addr}, Module[{path_integral, quantum_evolution, navigation_operator}, (* Quantum path integral between addresses *) path_integral = NIntegrate[ Exp[I * (target_addr - source_addr) * t] * BesselJ[0, Sqrt[(target_addr - source_addr)^2 * (1 - t^2)]], {t, 0, 1}, Method $
\]
